title: Index
content:
Index JUIT Waknaghat Search Login Register x Home About Us About us Message from Management Message from Faculty In-Charge Present Team Past Team Code of Ethics Alumni Services Member Benefits Request Forms Distinguished Alumni Alumni Achievements Alumni Awards Directory News and Updates News & Updates Alumni Stories Events Upcoming Events Past Events Gallery Albums Videos Engage Jobs/Internships Scholarship Contact Us Event Details Home Events Upcoming Events Gala Dinner Go Back Mar, 17 2018 at 07:00 pm Eutopia Resort Gala Dinner “Fondest memories are made when gathered around table”. After the musical evening, all the alumni were invited to have dinner with dignitaries of university at Eutopia on 17th March 2018. A formal welcome, interactions, various fun games and memento distribution marked the evening at its best. The splendid food and drinks along with heating the dance floor with the beats will be memorable. Memories marked a success and added another page to the JUIT celebrations calendar. About Us All who hail from the JUIT have set out on their own incredible journeys, building a life of success and enriching experiences.
